title: Concept brief: item-first lifecycle trace
hypothesis: If ProductOS makes one item traceable from intake through PRD handoff with explicit artifacts and gate outcomes, PMs will understand discovery state faster and defend decisions with less manual reconstruction.
why_now: AI-assisted PM tooling is expanding quickly, which increases the need for trustworthy basic execution and clear stage lineage before adding more superpowers.
why_us: ProductOS already has structured artifacts, validation controls, and a self-hosting workspace that can prove the pattern end to end.
advantage_hypothesis: An item-first timeline plus stage snapshot can combine the coherence of modern product systems with stricter evidence and governance discipline.
open_questions: Which delivery-stage artifacts should become mandatory in the next slice after PRD handoff?
